title: The Arrival
overview: As the Dark Rebel Army closes in, the Kingdom of Meta-llicana falls to its knees. Its only hope lies in awakening a powerful but evil sorcerer.

title: Rampage
overview: Left with no other option, Yoko revives Dark Schneider once again when a terrifying multiheaded monster attacks the Kingdom of Meta-llicana.

title: Abduction
overview: The first of four seals that contain the God of Destruction breaks. As a crisis looms in sight, Yoko grapples with conflicting emotions.

title: Invasion
overview: Sheila and Dark Schneider set out to free Yoko, whose captor threatens to torment her unless she discloses how she unseals the powerful wizard.

title: Showdown
overview: The demon god Efreet unleashes deadly flames, and Dark Schneider must find a way out in order to save Yoko.

title: Destiny
overview: Outraged by Dark Schneider's success, Kall-Su orders Arshes Nei, a half-dark elf, to put an end to the reincarnated wizard before he grows too strong.

title: The Demon Beast
overview: Arshes Nei sends sorcerer Kai Harn to defeat Dark Schneider, who uses High Ancient Magic to try to turn him into a stone statue.

title: The Progenitor
overview: Lucien reunites with Yoko in the forest, but they are soon attacked by a Werewolf soldier working for Count Di-amon, a powerful vampire.

title: Blue Nail
overview: While Dark Schneider struggles to break free from captivity, Yoko, Kai Harn and Sean Ari fend for themselves against Di-amon.

title: The Goddess of Thunder
overview: The remaining members of the Divine Kings gather and vow to eliminate Dark Schneider. Abigail tests Arshes Nei's loyalty to their mission.

title: Prophecy
overview: Dark Schneider and Arshes Nei reunite for the first time since his reincarnation. Baba, an old woman with prophetic powers, has an alarming vision.

title: Life or Death
overview: Arshes Nei unleashes a surprise attack on the castle, getting the upper hand in her battle against a disarmed adversary.

title: Wavering
overview: Nearly equal in strength, two opponents ratchet up the rapidly escalating fight. Meanwhile, the warriors struggle with their emotions.

title: Moved to Tears
overview: After Dark Schneider's sacrifice, his allies grieve a major loss. Meanwhile, Kall-Su and Abigail’s Army of Decay continue to wreak havoc.

title: Triumphant Return
overview: Arshes and Gara face-off against Lynch but realize they are no match against the ruthless creature. Abigail receives word of Dark Schneider’s return.

title: Incantation
overview: With his newfound strength, Dark Schneider attempts to face Vivian — a Devil Mace-wielding cyclops fueled by Anthrasax’s immense power — all on his own.

title: Ring
overview: Lich reaches Meta-llicana, seeking vengeance against Dark Schneider. The two face off but Arshes notices that something is off.

title: Secrets of the Sword
overview: Yoko fearlessly stands up against Abigail. Facing Lich alone, Gara’s only chance of survival is to use the full potential of the Murasame Blade.

title: Empress of Thunder
overview: Sensing danger, Arshes heads to Meta-llicana Castle and stops Abigail in his tracks when he sets out to collect the last seal.

title: Tyranny
overview: After learning the secret of the final seal, Dark Schneider agrees to protect Sheila. Abigail reveals his true self and turns the tables on Arshes Nei.

title: Fierce Battle
overview: Dark Schneider puts up a good fight against the evolved Abigail, but things take a turn for the worst when the dark wizard’s plan backfires.

title: Conclusion
overview: The castle walls crumble with the full force of Dark Schneider’s Helloween spell, but Abigail seems unaffected. Arshes swoops in to assist her lover.

title: Annihilation
overview: Arshes and Gara stand up to Abigail but are in no condition to fight. Abigail preys on Dark Schneider’s ultimate weakness.

title: End
overview: As Abigail taunts Dark Schneider for possessing a human heart, fire spirits come to the rescue and assist the wizard in one final battle.

title: Rebellion
overview: A leading member of the Sorcerer Shogun, Yngwie von Mattström conquers one city after another. Meanwhile, samurai masters try to secure food supplies.

title: Fate
overview: Samurai centurion Jorg Fishes faces off against Sorcerer Shogun Macapine Toni Strauss. Kall-Su reveals his sinister plans to rule the world.

title: Blue Storm
overview: The samurai corps brace themselves for the upcoming invasion. With no hope in sight, Yoko attempts a spell that comes at a heavy price.

title: Dawn
overview: The tables turn when a powerful ally makes a sudden appearance. Later, a defeated Macapine Toni Strauss lands in front of an unlikely survivor.

title: Ice and Snow
overview: Di-amon barges into Kall-Su's castle and stirs chaos. As Kall-Su's powers grow uncannily strong, Shella E,Lee notices that something is off.

title: Departure
overview: Kall-Su tasks demi-humans to deal with rioters, while he has grander plans for his Sorcerer Shoguns. Yoko deals with an untamed Dark Schneider.

title: Teleportation
overview: Yoko and crew learn about Kall-Su's sinister plans. Later, they are called to the basement of the castle and discover an ancient artifact.

title: Magic Land
overview: Left in the castle, Shella E, Lee learns the shocking truth. The Sorcerer Shogun experience unexpected turbulence on their way to King Crimson Glory.

title: Legend
overview: A young village boy listens to a bedtime story about the civilization that created Anthrasax. Meanwhile, Yoko and crew land in King Crimson Glory.

title: Distant Thunder
overview: Bol Gil Bol faces off against Dark Schneider. Gara and Macapine Toni Strauss face a threat. Arshes Nei dreams of her past.

title: Holy War I
overview: When a formidable opponent makes a sudden appearance, the samurai corps have a change of heart about Dark Schneider. Sheila finds herself in danger.

title: Holy War II
overview: A fierce showdown between the samurai corps and Sorcerer Shogun takes place. Kall-Su gets dangerously close to unlocking the final seal.

title: Holy War III
overview: Sheila experiences a sudden change in condition. Kall-Su and Dark Schneider unleash an epic battle of ice versus fire.

title: Holy War IV
overview: United over a common enemy, the samurai corps inspire the grieving Sorcerer Shogun with their unwavering spirit.

title: Gathering
overview: Unconscious within the beast, Kall-Su has flashbacks to his past. Determined to save his friend, Dark Schneider wields majestic powers like no other.
